reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with stronger handoff logic, clearer camera-search limitations, and better mission-fit framing.
strengths: The article makes the search-versus-confirmation split clear enough for non-specialist readers without becoming shallow.
The new handoff section improves decision value by explaining why cue quality matters more than simply owning both sensors.
The tone stays neutral and technical while still making a clear selection argument.
summary_assessment: This version now passes. It is clearer about how radar and cameras divide labor, and it gives readers a more realistic basis for system selection.
